name: Leela's Evening Journal
description: A gentle end-of-day reflection before sleep

questions.title: How are you feeling right now?
questions.prompt:
Rate your feeling from 1 to 5.
1 = not great  ·  3 = okay  ·  5 = really good!

questions.title: Your moment of joy
questions.prompt: What was the best part of your day?
questions.example: e.g. playing with a friend, something funny that happened, a yummy snack

questions.title: Your thorn
questions.prompt: Did you have a moment of frustration?
questions.example: e.g. something felt unfair, something didn't go as planned, a hard moment

questions.title: Living your values
questions.prompt:
Your values are: courage, compassion, honesty, sportsmanship, and fun.
Think of an action you did today that aligns with any of them.
questions.example: e.g. I was honest when it was hard, I showed compassion to a friend, I tried something that took courage

questions.title: Looking ahead
questions.prompt: Is there anything you're looking forward to tomorrow?
questions.example: e.g. an activity, seeing someone, trying something new

questions.title: Let it go
questions.prompt: Anything you want to let go of before you sleep?
questions.example: e.g. a worry, a bad feeling, something that bothered you
